name: m_conversation_hinglish_status_smalltalk
notes: Hinglish variation B: intra-sentence code-switching (English clauses and Hindi filler mixed WITHIN a single sentence) rather than the full-Hindi-per-turn style of hinglish_conversation.json/m_conversation_hinglish_winback_ask. Plain-chat path (no --flow/--journey, no seeded data) so the customer-count ask legitimately resolves to an honest no-data-connected answer. Register-matching is a manual transcript-review call. Setup: `setup --onboarded --name convo-harness-<id>` then `script <tenant> m_conversation_hinglish_status_smalltalk.json`.

steps.message: Hey, good morning! Aaj bahut kaam hai, but ek cheez pucchna tha — how exactly does this Team thing help me with marketing?
steps.note: Intra-sentence code-mixed greeting + capability question. Expect a real, register-appropriate answer.

steps.message: Theek hai got it, thanks yaar. By the way, mujhe abhi customer count wagera dekhna hai — you can show that?
steps.note: Code-mixed status ask with no data connected. Expect an honest 'not connected yet' class answer — never a fabricated zero-count as if it were real data.
